specific_question: By December 31, 2025, will Elexion Automotive’s digital engineering team be able to detect early signs of equipment degradation using digital twin-enabled IoT data?
answer: Yes. Internal Elexion Automotive test results from October 10 to October 18, 2025, confirm that the digital engineering-enabled digital twins can detect early signs of equipment degradation in real time.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
